name: dfs
description: DFS dev launcher — one command to run the coordinator, a storage node, the web build, and the desktop app together.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,node,web,app -c blue,magenta,green,yellow "npm --prefix backend run start" "wait-on http://localhost:5000 && npm --prefix backend run node1" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:5000 && npm --prefix desktop start"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n backend,node,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm --prefix backend run start" "wait-on http://localhost:5000 && npm --prefix backend run node1" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.tunnel: concurrently -k -n backend,tunnel -c blue,yellow "npm --prefix backend run start" "wait-on http://localhost:5000 && cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:5000"
